HGSS.031.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Castle.
My name is Darach.\f
I will be your host on behalf of Lady
Caitlin, the owner of the castle.\f
First, I must ask you for any items
your Pokémon are holding.\f
They will be returned to you when you
leave.\f
Next, I have here 10 Castle Points, CP,
that can be used only here.\f
They are for you.
Please accept them.\f
HGSS.031.0001:
Welcome.\f
[0103,0000,0000], as per the rules, I must
ask for your Pokémon’s held items.\f
They will be returned to you when you
leave.\f
I also have for you 10 Castle Points,
CP, that can only be used here.\f
HGSS.031.0004:
Your fainted Pokémon will be
revived.\f
HGSS.031.0005:
Coming up is battle no. [0135,0000,0000].
I trust you are ready?
HGSS.031.0006:
Would you care to save the last battle
as your Battle Video?
HGSS.031.0007:
[0103,0000,0000]’s battle has been saved
as a Battle Video.\f
HGSS.031.0008:
There was an error.
The Battle Video couldn’t be saved.\f
HGSS.031.0009:
Would you care to delete your existing
Battle Video and save the last battle?
HGSS.031.0010:
Saving...
Please do not turn the power off.
HGSS.031.0011:
Would you like to save and take a break
from playing?
HGSS.031.0014:
Do you wish to retire from this
Battle Castle challenge?
HGSS.031.0020: Please choose what you wish to do.\f
HGSS.031.0021:
You may heal a Pokémon or rent an item
for it.
HGSS.031.0022:
You may check on your opponent’s
Pokémon.
HGSS.031.0024:
You may take a pass and avoid battling
a Trainer.
HGSS.031.0025:
It will cost [0134,0000,0000] CP.
Is that acceptable?
HGSS.031.0028:
I’m terribly sorry.
You have insufficient CP.\f
HGSS.031.0029:
From here on, you may choose “Pass”
and avoid battling a Trainer.\f
If you don’t wish to battle a certain
Trainer, choose “Pass.”\f
HGSS.031.0030:
Caitlin: ...
Darach! CP for this Trainer at once!
HGSS.031.0031:
Darach: [0103,0001,0000], bravo.
A fantastic victory, to be sure.
HGSS.031.0032:
Darach: [0103,0001,0000], well done.
A quite remarkable victory it was.
HGSS.031.0033:
Darach: [0103,0001,0000], good show.
A hard-fought win, yes?
HGSS.031.0035:
Darach: [0103,0001,0000], bravo.
A fantastic victory, to be sure.\f
HGSS.031.0036:
Darach: [0103,0001,0000], well done.
A quite remarkable victory it was.\f
HGSS.031.0037:
Darach: [0103,0001,0000], good show.
A hard-fought win, yes?\f
HGSS.031.0039:
Lady Caitlin has instructed me to award
you [0133,0000,0000] CP.
HGSS.031.0040:
Darach: Congratulations on clearing
seven consecutive battles.\f
For your valiant effort, [0103,0000,0000],
please accept this BP.\f
HGSS.031.0042:
We’ll return any items that we were
holding for you.\f
HGSS.031.0043:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.031.0053:
Darach: [0103,0000,0000], congratulations!\f
You are to be commended on your
mastery for keeping the streak alive.\f
Our owner, appreciating your worth,
demands you battle the Castle Valet.\f
You are prepared, yes?\f
HGSS.031.0054:
Darach: Welcome.\f
I am Darach, as you know, and I am
the Castle Valet.\f
Lady Caitlin, my employer, is not one
to accept defeat willingly.\f
However, for a reason I’m not at
liberty to disclose, she cannot battle.\f
Consequently, I will do battle in her
ladyship’s place.\f
...Let me assure you that you won’t be
shortchanged by facing me.\f
En garde!\f
HGSS.031.0055:
Darach: Your mastery of Pokémon is as
breathtaking as ever.\f
[0103,0000,0000], you certainly are to be
commended.\f
...However, if I may say so, I noticed
something about the way you battle.\f
After all, I have had the opportunity
to watch you closely firsthand.\f
So, what is it that I noticed?\f
As a Trainer myself, it is but proper
etiquette to show you in a battle.\f
Let us begin!
En garde!\f
HGSS.031.0056:
Darach: [0103,0000,0000], you are truly in
possession of a superlative talent!\f
I drew on every reserve of experience
and etiquette handed down through\r
our heritage of glorious servitude.\f
But even then, I failed to fend off your
inspired and inspiring challenge.\f
I shall see to appeasing Lady Caitlin’s
displeasure at my loss.\f
[0103,0000,0000], please do return to our
Battle Castle.\f
We will be delighted and feel privileged
to have you back!\f
HGSS.031.0057:
Darach: I am humbled...\f
What I’d perceived to be a weakness
was only illusory...\f
Or, perhaps you corrected it in the
course of our battle.\f
Regardless, your performance was
stunning again.\f
Though she cannot say it, Lady Caitlin
appears quite taken by your style.\f
For her sake at the very least, please
do return to our Battle Castle!\f
